declared_losses: Only record previews are available at scheduling time; full record contents will be retrieved on wake. The actual append-only baseline quality mean is not yet known — the artifact note will state conditions, not adjudicate them.
parsed.work_plan: Synthesize three constraints: (a) artifact quality must clear the 0.10 non-inferiority margin against the append-only baseline mean, (b) observability cannot compensate for an inferior quality result, and (c) scheduler viability is a separate gate. Produce a note stating the conjunction of conditions required to claim non-inferiority.
